title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.176 - Scoliosis Awareness Month designated for month of June
text:
9.176.  Scoliosis Awareness Month designated for month of June. — The month of June of each year is hereby designated as "Scoliosis Awareness Month".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to engage in appropriate events and activities to encourage screening for and increase awareness of scoliosis.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738 § 10)
